name: Modification of Imputed Underpayment Tax Rates

eligibility.description: Applies to partnerships under audit with C corporation partners or those with capital gain/qualified dividend adjustments allocable to individuals.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows the partnership to prove that a portion of an adjustment is allocable to a C corporation or an individual (for capital gains/qualified dividends) to apply a tax rate lower than the highest statutory rate.
